metadata.title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications → AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated) (Concept Crosswalk)
metadata.schema-basis: NIST IR 8477 relationship vocabulary + NIST IR 8278A r1 STRM resource model

reference-document.title: AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated)
reference-document.author: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project

metadata.methodology: Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: sim≥0.6 → equal; 0.4≤sim<0.6 → intersects-with; sim<0.4 → unspecified. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (source-item, target-Core-entity) unique pair using highest-similarity claim for that target. is-primary="true" marks item overall highest-similarity claim's target. subset-of / superset-of NOT in first cut (cosine similarity lacks directional info; SME refinement future work). STRM resource model: pilot doc → DocumentaryImpl; source-item → ConcreteImpl; AppSec Core V1 → Reference Document; Core entity → Concept.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Least-Privilege Authorization Governance. Keep permission models explicit, separated by role or attribute and bounded by least-privilege rules. identity and trust control. authorization

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.599; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000001 at Practice level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Authorization Policy Integrity And Least Privilege. Maintain explicit authorization policy and identity-to-permission binding under least-privilege constraints, including role-based and attribute-bas…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.593; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000002 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Access Policy Enforcement. Keep permission models explicit, separated by role or attribute and bounded by least-privilege rules. Authenticate callers and enforce authorization decisions consistently …

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.579; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000003 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Secret Scope And Binding Controls. Bind pipeline, workload and deploy actions to explicit operational identities and prefer federated or short-lived credentials where possible. Separate secret use by…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.484; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000008 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Non-Revealing Error Surface Control. Keep client-visible failures controlled, generic and resistant to information leakage or enumeration. policy and gate enforcement. error surface control

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.480; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000009 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Schema And Allowlist Enforcement. Constrain structured payloads and accepted values through explicit schema, type and allowlist checks. validation and analysis. schema enforcement

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.437; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000004 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Release Promotion And Human Approval Integrity. Promotion between environments must respect explicit gates, including human approval for irreversible actions. Promotion gates are enforced and irrever…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.428; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000010 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: mitigate with current techniques

reference-element.description: Security-Relevant Configuration Integrity And Override Control. Security-relevant configuration must remain protected from uncontrolled change, injection or silent override across build, deploy and r…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.413; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim OWASP_LLM_TOP_10-CLAIM-000011 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: Implement data sanitization to prevent user data from entering the training model

reference-element.description: Log Retention Lifecycle Management Controls. Govern retention, archive and purge behavior of security-relevant logs explicitly. Automated retention policies, archive workflows, and scheduled purge me…

source-element.description: Implement data sanitization to prevent user data from entering the training model

reference-element.description: Boundary Input Validation. Validate external inputs and malformed messages at entry points before processing continues. validation and analysis. contract validation

reference-element.description: Audit Record Retention And Lifecycle Governance. Audit logs must be retained, archived and purged under explicit lifecycle rules that satisfy security and regulatory expectations. Security records re…

reference-element.description: Dangerous Pattern Exclusion. Detect and block dangerous input-handling patterns such as permissive execution, unsafe rendering and injection-prone constructs. validation and analysis. pattern exclusi…

reference-element.description: Short-Lived Token Controls. Keep session identifiers and tokens bounded by transport, scope, TTL and explicit invalidation rules. The current semantic anchor comes mostly from adjacent operational-id…

reference-element.description: Bounded Session And Token Management. Keep session identifiers and tokens bounded by transport, scope, TTL and explicit invalidation rules. identity and trust control. session management

source-element.description: LLM03:2025 Supply Chain. LLM supply chains are susceptible to various vulnerabilities, which can affect the integrity of training data, models, and deployment platforms. These risks can result in bia…
